title: Subscribe for email notifications on consumer product safety and updates to the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act - Canada.ca
content:
## Subscribe for email notifications on consumer product safety and updates to the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
Subscribe to our electronic mailing list to receive the latest news and information on consumer product safety and updates to the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act (act).
Membership to the electronic mailing list is open to the public. Subscribers only receive updates on their selected categories:
- when new information is available
- when new information about the act is posted online
We encourage you to share this address with your colleagues.
To subscribe, and to help us deliver the information that is most important to you:
- enter your email address in the space provided
- select the categories that are of interest to you
- click the " Subscribe " button
You will receive an email confirmation where you must click on the link to activate your subscription.
Required fields are marked with an asterisk ( * ).

## Change your subscription
Changing your email requires unsubscribing under the previous email address and re-subscribing with your new email address.
If you are already a subscriber and wish to unsubscribe, type in your email address in the box below and select the " Unsubscribe " button. A request to unsubscribe will remove your email address from both consumer product safety mailing lists.
Note: If you have comments or questions about the program, please contact us at cps-spc@hc-sc.gc.ca .
